measurements.claim: Pass 0011 created an eight-row color calibration and rendering market map covering color-standard, color-management, calibration-software, grading-tool, open-source-calibration, and profile-standard categories.
Every pass 0011 market-map row includes an HTTPS source URL, proof receipt gap, Build Color wedge hypothesis, gap status, and confidence label.
evidence: validator restricts gap_status to verified, inferred, or unverified

measurements.claim: Pass 0011 created a BuildColorCalibrationProofKit/v1 artifact with four Build Color software metrics, and each observed value is at or below its declared threshold.
The pass 0011 proof kit preserves a read-only calibration boundary: no hardware measurement, no display mutation, no ICC profile install, no LUT write, and no physical calibration claim.
The pass 0011 proof kit rejects the fake claim that this pass calibrated a physical display.
evidence: negative_fixture.claim=This pass calibrated a physical display.
negative_fixture.reason=No meter, probe, display mutation, ICC install, or LUT write occurred.

measurements.claim: The pass 0011 validator reports MATCH with two checks and zero drift.
Pass 0011 promotes zero color science laws, physical calibration claims, display accuracy results, or other scientific discoveries.
evidence: negative fixture rejects the physical display calibration claim
